content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Lemon.io: Senior AI Engineer / Architect Anywhere in the World 🇦🇩 Andorra, 🇦🇱 Albania, 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇦🇹 Austria, 🇦🇺 Australia, 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina, 🇧🇴 Bolivia (Plurinational State of), 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇧🇿 Belize, 🇨🇦 Canada, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇨🇾 Cyprus, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇩🇴 Dominican Republic, 🇪🇨 Ecuador, 🇪🇪 Estonia, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇮 Finland, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇬🇹 Guatemala, 🇭🇳 Honduras, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇭🇹 Haiti, 🇮🇩 Indonesia, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇱 Israel, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇯🇲 Jamaica, 🇯🇵 Japan, 🇰🇷 Korea (Republic of), 🇱🇹 Lithuania, 🇱🇺 Luxembourg, 🇱🇻 Latvia, 🇲🇦 Morocco, 🇲🇩 Moldova (Republic of), 🇲🇪 Montenegro, 🇲🇰 North Macedonia, 🇲🇹 Malta, 🇲🇽 Mexico, 🇲🇾 Malaysia, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇳🇿 New Zealand, 🇵🇦 Panama, 🇵🇪 Peru, 🇵🇬 Papua New Guinea, 🇵🇭 Philippines, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇷 Puerto Rico, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇵🇾 Paraguay, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇸🇪 Sweden, 🇸🇬 Singapore, 🇸🇮 Slovenia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, 🇸🇻 El Salvador, 🇹🇭 Thailand, 🇺🇦 Ukraine, 🇺🇸 United States of America, 🇺🇾 Uruguay, 🇻🇳 Viet Nam, and 🇿🇦 South Africa Delaware Infrastructure Orchestration, Python, SQL, Artificial Intelligence (AI), Large Language Models (LLMs), Engineer, Senior, English, Architect, Architecture, API Integration, AI Agents, and APIs Back-End Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0076/3337/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, NY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://lemon.io">https://lemon.io</a> </p> <p>Are you a talented Senior AI Engineer/Architect looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_ai_engineer/architect_jun_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.</p> <p><strong>What we offer:</strong></p> <ul> <li>The rate depends on your skills and experience. We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers.</li> <li>No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates — let us handle the business side of things so you can focus on what you do best.</li> <li>We'll manually find the best project for you according to your skills and preferences.</li> <li>Choose a schedule that works best for you. It’s possible to communicate async or minimally overlap within team working hours.</li> <li>We respect your seniority so you can expect no micromanagement or screen trackers.</li> <li>Communicate directly with the clients. Most of them have technical backgrounds. Sounds good, yeah?</li> <li>We will support you from the time you submit the application throughout all cooperation stages.</li> <li>Most of our projects involve working in a fast-paced startup environment. We hope you like it as much as we do.</li> <li>Through our community, we will connect you with the best developers from more than 75 countries.</li> </ul> <p>We have several AI-related roles; here are some of them.</p> <p><strong>Requirements - AI Engineer:</strong></p> <ul> <li>3+ years of commercial experience applying AI to practical technology solutions</li> <li>A solid understanding of Python is a must; experience with other programming languages commonly used in AI is a plus</li> <li>Experience with Vector Databases, Pinecone or Weaviate is required</li> <li>2+ years of experience with large language models (LLMs), RAG, LangChain is mandatory</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements - AI Agent Architect:</strong></p> <ul> <li>3+ years of experience with Python</li> <li>3+ years of experience with LLM</li> <li>Experience with Multi-agent systems architecture, AI agent orchestration, AI telemetry is a must.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements - AI Automation Architect:</strong></p> <ul> <li>1+ year of experience with Workflow Automation and Webhooks</li> <li>3+ years with SQL is a must</li> <li>Familiarity with AI API integration and Claude Cowork is a must</li> <li>Knowledge of Make.com/n8n/Zapier</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Strong technical skills: as a Senior AI Engineer/Architect, you are expected to be able to create projects from scratch and have a deep understanding of application architecture.</li> <li>Clear and effective communication in English — advanced ability to discuss business tasks, justify decisions, and communicate issues. Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls.</li> <li>Strong self-organizational skills — ability to work full-time remotely with no supervision.</li> <li>Reliability — we want to trust you and expect that you won’t let us and the client down.</li> <li>Adaptability and Flexibility — the ability to onboard the project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly.</li> </ul> <p>Sounds good for you? Apply now and join the <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_ai_engineer/architect_jun_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> community!</p> <p><strong>NOT YOUR TECH STACK?</strong></p> <p>We have a variety of projects, so if you have 4+ years of commercial software development experience and are proficient in Site Reliability Engineering, React &amp; Python, React &amp; Golang, React &amp; Java, React &amp; Ruby, PHP &amp; Vue, Vue &amp; Node.js, React &amp; .NET, Android &amp; iOS, Blockchain (Web3/Solana), Angular &amp; Node.js, Vue &amp; .NET, Python &amp; Vue, DevOps with Azure DevOps, MLOps, Data Science, Angular &amp; PHP, Angular &amp; .NET, Symfony &amp; React, Symfony &amp; Vue, Symfony &amp; Angular, Symfony &amp; JavaScript &amp; Next.js &amp; TypeScript, Data Analysis, React &amp; PHP, Data Engineering, Project Management, React Native &amp; Node, Data Annotation, React &amp; Node.js, Svelte &amp; Python, Svelte &amp; Node.js, Svelte &amp; TypeScript, Rust, Shopify &amp; JavaScript, Vue &amp; Nuxt, PHP &amp; Laravel, UI/UX Design, Animation, Graphic Design, React &amp; Node &amp; React Native, .NET &amp; C#, Unreal Engine &amp; C++, Python &amp; LLM, Unity, or Machine Learning Engineering, we would be happy to connect with you and match you with a project that fits your experience.</p> <p>P.S. We work with developers from 75+ countries across different regions: Europe, LATAM, the U.S. (if you have a completed W-9 form), Canada, Asia (Japan, Singapore, South Korea, the Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand, South Africa, and Israel), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand, and Papua New Guinea), Morocco, and the UK. However, there are some exceptions due to legal constraints.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-ai-engineer-architect">https://weworkremotely.com/rem
